name: Asparagus Tip Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup KASSERI OR FRESH PARMESAN, FINELY CHOPPED
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to directions on the package.
2. While the pasta is cooking, melt butter in a sauté pan over medium-high heat.
3. Add asparagus tips and cook for about 4 minutes until they are tender.
4. Drain the cooked pasta and toss with olive oil.
5. Add the asparagus, butter, sliced black olives, mustard, lemon juice, salt, and pepper to the pasta.
6. Serve topped with freshly grated Kasseri or fresh Parmesan cheese.
